title: SailStatus (SimplyStatus)
body:
## SailStatus (formerly known as SimplyStatus) This mod is for **Minecraft** game status in **[Discord](https://discord.com/company)**.
With extensive customization variation, in the form of localization and icon changes.
It is also possible to change the Discord application ID. [![alinlib](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/alinlib/Requires.svg)](/mod/alinlib) ### Examples of statuses **In Main Menu**

**Statistics**

**Time cycle in status**

Mods that can interact with the status - ReplayMod - Flashback [2.2.0-alpha.8] - WaterPlayer - Voice - PlasmoVoice - Simple Voice Chat
[![kel](https://wf.kelcu.ru/kel-budges/me/Made%20by.svg)](https://kelcu.ru)
